# Token Toilet

> A Web3 DeFi application for disposing of unwanted ERC-20 tokens by transferring them to a burn address on Sepolia testnet. Built with Next.js 16 App Router + TypeScript + Wagmi v2 + Reown AppKit, featuring a complete design system with violet branding and glass morphism aesthetics.

Token Toilet provides a way to dispose of unwanted ERC-20 tokens on Sepolia testnet by transferring them to the burn address `0x000000000000000000000000000000000000dEaD`. The v1.0 MVP is single-chain (Sepolia) and ERC-20 only. Multi-chain support (Ethereum mainnet, Polygon, Arbitrum), ERC-721 disposal, charity integration (The Giving Block), NFT proof-of-disposal receipts, and the Fountain/blind-box mechanism are deferred to post-v1.0.

## Documentation

- [Main README](readme.md): Primary project documentation, features overview, and getting started guide
- [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): Comprehensive contributing guidelines, development workflow, and coding standards
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Project version history, notable changes, and release notes following semantic versioning
- [MVP Strategy](mvp.md): **ARCHIVED** — original pre-rebaseline implementation plan (multi-chain/charity/NFT/Fountain); superseded by the MVP Rebaseline Requirements under Specifications below
- [Legacy Concept](legacy.md): Original project concept and humorous explanation of the "toilet, fountain, and sprinkler" ecosystem
- [Design System Guide](docs/design-system/getting-started.md): Comprehensive design system documentation with components, tokens, and Web3 patterns
- [AI Agent Instructions](.github/copilot-instructions.md): Technical architecture and development patterns for AI agents working on the project

## Specifications

- [MVP Rebaseline Requirements](docs/brainstorms/2026-04-16-mvp-rebaseline-requirements.md): **Current canonical scope** — single-chain Sepolia ERC-20 burn-address disposal flow, deferred features, and success criteria for v1.0
- [Product Requirements Document](docs/archive/prd.md): **ARCHIVED** — original multi-chain/charity/NFT/Fountain PRD, retained for historical reference and future roadmap planning
- [Development Plan](docs/archive/plan.md): **ARCHIVED** — original development roadmap, retained for historical reference

- [Architecture Documentation](docs/development/architecture.md): System architecture, component organization, and technical design patterns

- [Accessibility Guidelines](docs/design-system/accessibility.md): Web accessibility implementation and testing guidelines

- [Package Dependencies](package.json): Project dependencies, scripts, and technology stack definition
